en:
Previous output did not produce a valid step_mini_eval call.

Please output ONE <sentra-tools> block with invoke name "step_mini_eval".
- decision must be one of: pass, retry_same, retry_regen, replan, fail_fast
- reason must be a non-empty concrete explanation from evidence
- if decision != pass, include failureClass
- if known, include failedCriteria and evidence arrays
- Tool call MUST use Sentra XML typed parameter nodes (<string>/<number>/<array>/<object>), not raw JSON text inside <parameter>

Attempt {{attempt}}/{{max_retries}}
Last error: {{error}}
